title: WasmCode "resurrection" using the WasmImportWrapperCache can lead to JIT allocation UaF, causing memory corruption
bounty_rationale: high-quality report demonstrating RCE in a sandboxed process / the renderer
description_snippet: `WasmCode` are ref-counted objects which represent a corresponding JIT allocation containing Wasm code. These objects are not freed immediately when their reference count reaches zero - instead they are added to a list of "potentially dead code" (`WasmEngine::potentially_dead_code_`). Once enough "p
